name: groone-desktop
description: GroOne Windows desktop app — licensed yearly subscription

scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run copy:static
scripts.build:web: cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:47600/api/v1 NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_TEST_TOOLS=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_DESKTOP_BUILD=1 npm --prefix ../web run build
scripts.prepare:all: npm run build:web && npm run bundle:web && npm run bundle:backend
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run bundle:web && npm run bundle:backend && electron-builder --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:fresh: npm run build && npm run prepare:all && electron-builder --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build && npm run bundle:web && npm run bundle:backend && electron-builder --win dir --x64
